prestazioni: M840TE (3.0L twin-turbo V6 + e-motor hybrid) ECU recalibration via McLaren Special Operations (MSO) 'Artura Performance Pack' with 750+ HP output, optimized torque split (60% ICE / 40% e-motor) and revised hybrid energy deployment for track-focused 0-60 mph in 2.3s via Launch Control 2.0

Garrett GT2260S turbochargers with billet compressor wheels (60mm inducer, 84mm exducer) and TiAL MV-R 44mm wastegates, paired with a custom 4.5" titanium downpipe system by Armytrix for reduced backpressure and 12% faster spool

Ohlins TTX46 MkII coilovers with 3-way adjustable damping (compression, rebound, and hybrid mode), McLaren-specific spring rates (450 lb/in front, 550 lb/in rear), and integrated ride height sensors for dynamic aero optimization via Artura's active rear spoiler
estetica: Liberty Walk LB-WORKS 'Artura Widebody' kit with carbon fiber front fenders (30mm wider per side), rear quarter panels (40mm wider per side), and a functional hood scoop for improved M840TE intercooler airflow

Vorsteiner V-RT 10 21" forged wheels (9.5J front, 12J rear) with McLaren-approved offset (ET45 front, ET50 rear) and Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30 front, 325/30 rear) for 1:1 grip-to-power ratio

Novitec 'Artura Carbon Pack' including a full carbon fiber front splitter with integrated canards, rear diffuser with active Gurney flap, and side skirts with vortex generators, all coated in McLaren 'Ventura Orange' with matte clear coat for UV resistance
